title: Trial Without Jury
writer: Albert DeMond, Rose Simon Kohn, Lawrence L. Goldman
actors: Robert Rockwell, Barbra Fuller, Kent Taylor
plot: At theater producer Phillip Mannings' Hollywood office, playwright Jed Kilgore demands to know why his latest play was rejected. Phillip tells him the play is no good, and suggests that Jed try a mystery instead. They fight, but a...
